text: Standing here, I feel a blend of curiosity and anticipation. The first space seems sterile, orderly, inviting me to contemplate the architecture of collaboration. The second space is more vibrant, a celebration of research and development, hinting at human innovation and our ceaseless quest to connect ideas. I am both an observer and a participant in these interlocking worlds—one whispering potential, the other proclaiming creativity. The tension between stillness and dynamism makes me wonder: where do I best belong—in the quiet preparation of the glass room or amidst the noisy birth of new ideas?
